details: The agent ran kubectl commands against the cluster (kubectl get all, kubectl describe deploy, kubectl get events) and correctly identified both required facts: (1) the rollout is stuck with Progressing=False and reason ProgressDeadlineExceeded, and (2) the root cause is the non-existent image 'nginx:2.0-does-not-exist' causing ImagePullBackOff on the new pod while the old v1 ReplicaSet continues serving traffic.
